introSection: Crush's Coaster is a steel spinning enclosed roller coaster at Walt Disney Studios Park in Marne la Vallée, Île-de-France, France.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Crush's Coaster is similar to Maurer Söhne's Xtended SC 2000 design except for the fact that it has some things that the standard model doesn't have, like an elongated non-stop loading system in the station akin to that of Maurer's Xtended SC 3000 model and a dark ride section before the roller coaster section of the ride, which includes an outdoor chain lift hill and a drop.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Crush Coaster on the parks website

fullText:
Crush's Coaster is a steel spinning enclosed roller coaster at Walt Disney Studios Park in Marne la Vallée, Île-de-France, France.

Crush's Coaster is similar to Maurer Söhne's Xtended SC 2000 design except for the fact that it has some things that the standard model doesn't have, like an elongated non-stop loading system in the station akin to that of Maurer's Xtended SC 3000 model and a dark ride section before the roller coaster section of the ride, which includes an outdoor chain lift hill and a drop.






 * Crush Coaster on the parks website
